subject: Re: Take a look at this...
body:
Would interested to see what Bill Gates thinks of this story. He is backing these PE guys who are putting their money in private hospitals in India/Africa. Pretty interesting stuff.

http://www.nytimes.com/2016/10/09/business/dealbook/an-investors-plan-to-transplant-private-health-care-in-africa.html?rref=collection%2Fbyline%2Flandon-thomas-jr.&action=click&contentCollection=undefined&region=stream&module=stream_unit&version=latest&contentPlacement=1&pgtype=collection&_r=0

--

Landon Thomas, Jr.
Financial Reporter
New York Times
